name: Verify user search, friend request sending, persistence, and cancellation

steps.name: Logging in the user with email: greencitytest69@hotmail.com
Clicking signin button in the header
Sign in
Send 'POST' request to '/signIn'
Precondition: A target user exists in the system who is not yet in the user's friend list
Delete user's request to friend
Send 'DELETE' request to '/31/cancelRequest'
Step 1: Navigate to the GreenCity URL
Step 2: Click on the 'My Space' section in the header
Clicking the my space link in the header
Step 3: Click on the 'See all' link in the 'My Friends' section within the profile information banner
Click View all friends link
Check My Friends page is loaded
Step 4: Click on 'Find a friend' tab on 'My Friends' page.
Select tab: 'Find a friend'
Step 5: Enter the target username into the Search input field
Get a friend name and city from a Friend card
Step 6: Click the 'Add Friend' button on the found user's card
Click Add friend button on a Friend card
Step 7: Refresh the page.
Step 8: Enter the same target username into the Search input field.
Get a friend name and city from a Friend card
Step 9: Click on the user card.
Click on a Friend card
Step 10: Click on the 'Cancel Request' button.
Step 11: Navigate back to the previous page ('Find Friend' page).
Step 12: Enter the same target username into the Search input field.
Get a friend name and city from a Friend card

items.statusDetails:
AssertionError: assert 'Add friend' == 'Cancel request'
  
  - Cancel request
  + Add friend
